name: Bumper Crop Red Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Anaheim or Poblano or New Mex chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chiles in a single layer in a shallow pan. Broil 3 to 4 inches from the heat until blistered on one side.
2. Turn the chiles and blister the other side. Place them in a paper bag, seal, and let steam for 20 minutes.
3. Remove the skin and seeds from the chiles, then chop them (wear gloves to avoid injury).
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
5. Heat on high until boiling, about 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat and simmer another 10 minutes.
7. Cool completely before storing. Freeze or store hot salsa in sterile jars.
8. Process the jars according to the timing provided with your canner.
Makes 14 cups.
